letters.clue: A round fruit, often red or green, that grows on a tree.
You read this; it has many pages.
A small animal that says 'meow' and likes to sleep.
This person helps you when you are sick.
A very big grey animal with a long nose.
An animal that lives in water and swims.
The colour of grass and leaves.
A building where a family lives.
Land with water all around it.
A drink you make from oranges or apples.
A small metal thing you use to open a door.
A big wild cat; people call it the king of the jungle.
You can see this bright round thing in the sky at night.
This person works in a hospital and cares for patients.
A round fruit, and also a colour between red and yellow.
You use this to write or draw, and you can rub it out.
A woman who rules a country, like a king's wife.
Water that falls from the sky.
This gives us light and heat in the day.
A piece of furniture with legs where you eat your dinner.
You open this to stay dry in the rain.
Healthy food like carrots, peas, and beans.
A glass opening in a wall that you look through.
A wild animal like a dog, with orange-red fur. (contains X)
The colour of a lemon and the sun.
An African animal that looks like a horse with black and white lines.
